chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 1326 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16-10-2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. J.K Jarwar, Advocate for Respondents 8,9&10 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with Iftikhar Ahmed Langah, XEN Irrigation, Moro >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, does not press prayer clause (a) and (b), while pressing prayer clause (c) and submits that Respondent No.4 be directed to act strictly in accordance with the law. Counsel for the private respondents as well as learned AAG conceded such submission of the learned Counsel for the Petitioner. In the circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with direction to Respondent No.4 to act strictly in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
